details: The agent systematically ran kubectl commands across all 11 fault namespaces and correctly identified each root cause: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap 'app-config'), fault-crashloop (hardcoded DB connection failure causing crash loop), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch: web-backend-v2 vs web-backend), fault-imagepull (non-existent image tag nginx:1.99.99-nonexistent), fault-init (init container migration script fails with locked table error), fault-multicontainer (sidecar log-shipper can't resolve log-collector.logging.svc DNS), fault-oom (OOMKilled due to 25Mi memory limit), fault-pvc (PVC references non-existent storage class fast-ssd), fault-readiness (readiness probe targets port 8080 but nginx listens on 80), fault-rollout (stalled rollout due to invalid image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist), fault-unschedulable (nodeSelector disktype:ssd-nvme-gen5 matches no nodes). The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged. All 11 faults identified with accurate, evidence-backed root causes.
